summary: Fixed two Greptile findings: watch status now uses the most-recent price point (deduped against the current products price) as the previous observation so the delta spans one change; price-drops skips points with an unparseable timestamp.
reason: P1: when index runs without --price-history, products.current_price is fresher than the latest recorded point, so the delta was spanning two changes. P2: a malformed ts parsed to the zero time and won baseline selection, corrupting drop rankings.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/cli/ green incl. new regression tests TestNovelWatchStatusProductsDivergeFromHistory + TestNovelPriceDropsSkipsMalformedTimestamp; live dogfood 76/0.
